2020-T4-P7-S1.trunk: S+be+表 + 冒号展开：France's planned tax is a clear warning（法国拟征之税是一记明确警告）
structure: 主句：France's planned tax is a clear warning
冒号后（展开警告内容）：Unless …, other nations are likely to follow suit, and American companies will face a cascade of different taxes …
├ 条件状语从句(Unless)：Unless a broad consensus can be reached on reforming the international tax system
└ 并列主句(and)：other nations are likely to follow suit / American companies will face a cascade of different taxes from dozens of nations
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 taxes〕：that will prove burdensome and costly
2020-T4-P7-S1.logic: 主句 tax is a warning；冒号展开：Unless 条件从句 + 两个并列主句（nations follow suit / companies will face taxes）；that 定语从句修饰 taxes（将被证明…）。
notes: 冒号后展开警告的内容；Unless 引导条件状语从句（除非…）。
and 连接两个并列主句（other nations… / American companies…）；follow suit 仿效跟进。
taxes … that will prove burdensome and costly：that 定语从句修饰 taxes（prove + 形容词 终将证明是…）。

2020-T4-P1-S3.trunk: S+V+O(refer to A as B)：Many … have referred to this as a 「GAFA tax」（许多人把它称为「GAFA 税」）
structure: 主句：Many French politicians and media outlets have referred to this as a 「GAFA tax」
└ refer to A as B：refer to this as a 「GAFA tax」
现在分词作结果状语：meaning that it is designed to apply primarily to companies such as Google, Apple, Facebook and Amazon
├ 宾语从句(that)：it is designed to apply primarily to companies…
└ 破折号同位/换言：in other words, multinational tech companies based in the United States（based… 过去分词修饰 companies）
2020-T4-P1-S3.logic: 主句 refer to A as B（把它称为…）；meaning that… 现在分词作结果状语（意思是…）；破折号 in other words… 是对前面 companies 的同位换言；based in… 过去分词定语。
notes: refer to A as B：把 A 称为 B。
meaning that…：现在分词作结果/补充状语（意即…）。
in other words, multinational tech companies based in…：破折号引出同位换言；based in… 过去分词作定语。

2020-T4-P5-S1.trunk: 并列双分句(but)：① These … developments differ in their specifics ② they are all designed to tax multinationals …
structure: 分句①：These unilateral developments differ in their specifics
并列(but)分句②：they are all designed to tax multinationals on income and revenue …
├ 定语从句〔that，修饰 income and revenue〕：that countries believe they should have a right to tax（countries believe 为插入）
└ 让步状语从句(even if)：even if international tax rules do not grant them that right
2020-T4-P5-S1.logic: but 连接两分句；分句② be designed to tax…；that 定语从句修饰 income and revenue（countries believe (that) they should have a right to tax，countries believe 插入）；even if 让步从句。
notes: differ in：在…方面不同；be designed to do：旨在做…。
income and revenue that countries believe they should have a right to tax：that 定语从句修饰 income and revenue，countries believe 是插入（各国认为自己有权征税的…）。
even if 引导让步状语从句（即便…）；grant sb sth 授予。
